12. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(karen,X0) | (~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0))) [ennf transformation 2]

15. ! [X0] : (share_with(karen,X0,lisa) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0))) [ennf transformation 6]
16. ! [X0] : (share_with(karen,X0,lisa) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0)) [flattening 15]
17. ! [X0] : ((netflix_show(X0) & popular(X0)) | ~popular_netflix_show(X0)) [ennf transformation 10]
19. popular_netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
20. binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
25. share_with(karen,X0,lisa) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0) [cnf transformation 16]
26. ~share_with(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [cnf transformation 11]
33. ~popular_netflix_show(X0) | popular(X0) [cnf transformation 17]

35. popular(stranger_things) [resolution 33,19]
36. netflix_show(stranger_things) [resolution 34,19]
43. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~binge_watch(karen,stranger_things) [resolution 25,26]
44. ~binge_watch(karen,stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 43,36]
45. ~popular(stranger_things) | ~netflix_show(stranger_things) [resolution 44,20]
46. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 45,35]
47. $false [forward subsumption resolution 46,36]
